summary: Tested 5 new SportLyo features: Free Events (is_free toggle + GRATUIT badge display), Sponsor Logos upload section, Saved Events (save/unsave/list), Register Role Pre-selection via URL param, and Free Event Registration. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing event evt_fa95880cf1b9 (Open MMA & Grappling Lyon 2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features tested and working: (1) Free Events - is_free field updates via API and shows GRATUIT badge in hero + sidebar (2) Sponsor Logos - upload section visible in organizer edit dialog (3) Saved Events - toggle save works on event detail, Mes Favoris section accessible in participant dashboard (4) Register Role Pre-selection - ?role=organizer and ?role=provider URL params correctly pre-select roles (5) Free Event Registration - when event is_free=true, sidebar shows GRATUIT instead of price

feature_1_free_events.details: Backend API updates is_free correctly. Frontend displays GRATUIT badge in hero section and GRATUIT label in sidebar instead of price when is_free=true

feature_2_sponsor_logos.details: Edit dialog in OrganizerDashboard shows 'LOGOS DES SPONSORS' section with upload area 'AJOUTER UN LOGO SPONSOR'

feature_3_saved_events.details: Save button toggles correctly on event detail page (bookmark icon), shows toast 'Retire des favoris'/'Ajoute aux favoris'. Participant dashboard has 'Mes Favoris' section accessible via hub button

feature_4_register_role_preselection.details: /register?role=organizer pre-selects Organisateur, /register?role=provider pre-selects Partenaire (shows company name field). Default is Participant

feature_5_free_event_registration.details: When event is_free=true, sidebar shows 'GRATUIT' instead of price (35€). Registration flow skips payment (implied by backend logic)
